senses.gloss: oil (all types of oil, edible, fuel, motor oil, etc.)

examples.text: أُضِيفُ قَلِيلًا مِنَ الزَّيْتِ إِلَى السَّلَطَةِ.
examples.english: I add a little oil to the salad.

examples.text: يَكَادُ زَيْتُهَا يُضِيءُ وَلَوْ لَمْ تَمْسَسْهُ نَارٌ
examples.english: its oil would almost glow even if untouched by fire.

senses.gloss: to oil, to lubricate, to grease

etymology.text:
A culture word borrowed from Aramaic זיתא / ܙܝܬܐ (zaytā).

Denominal verb derived from زَيْت (zayt, “oil”).
